content:
📜 1. Each Faction, Archetype, and Group Type Has Its Own Unique Fate Countering Ability

📜 Different groups and individuals have specialized methods for manipulating or reversing fate.

✔ How Fate Counters Work Across Groups:
• Factions → Each faction counters fate in a unique way that fits its identity.
• Archetypes → Each archetype has one unique fate-related ability (ex: delaying, twisting, absorbing).
• Solo Players → Have a separate mechanic to intervene but must sacrifice more than faction-aligned players.

✔ Examples of Unique Fate Countering Abilities:
• The Scholars’ Override → Can rewrite the terms of a fate shift instead of reversing it.
• The Warriors’ Wager → Can challenge fate via combat (debate, skill check, or randomized duel).
• The Tricksters’ Distortion → Can swap two results on the Fate Wheel instead of undoing them.
• The Devout’s Atonement → Can remove a fate shift only if another class-wide burden is added.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 542 (chunk 542/555)
